headline: Pomerantz Probe Adds Governance And Legal Risk To Clorox Recovery Story
summary: Pomerantz LLP has started an investigation into Clorox (NYSE:CLX) over potential securities law violations. The probe focuses on alleged misconduct by certain company officers and directors. This development introduces an additional governance and legal risk for existing and prospective shareholders. Clorox, trading at $95.11, has had a mixed share price record, with the stock up 5.2% over the past week but down 3.6% over the past month. Over longer periods, returns have also been weak,...

headline: Clorox (CLX) Valuation Check As Investigation And Margin Outlook Reset Shake Investor Confidence
summary: Clorox investigation and outlook reset Pomerantz LLP has launched an investigation into Clorox (CLX) after the company reported a decrease in gross margin and lowered its full-year fiscal 2026 gross margin outlook, citing higher-than-expected supply chain costs and delayed cost savings. See our latest analysis for Clorox. Clorox's share price has been under pressure, with the stock down about 25% over 90 days and its 1 year total shareholder return also declining around 24%, which aligns with...
